finding_results.evidence: Four negation-pivot instances retained: (1) chapters/chapter_15.md:17 'not dramatic, not scared, just insulted' — defines Theo's expression by exclusion, not inferable from 'insulted' alone. (2) chapters/chapter_15.md:63 'Not the duvet from their bed, not the fleece throw' — blanket identification earns its exclusions. (3) chapters/chapter_15.md:165 'not because the story was funny exactly, though it was, but because they were both there' — distinguishes shared presence from shared humor. (4) chapters/chapter_15.md:217 'Not well, not deeply' — defines fitful parental sleep quality. Removed instances: line 25 negation-pivot replaced with direct assertion 'Interior heat — metabolic'; line 89 'not precocious, not wise, just' cut to 'a kid with a fever'; line 139 three-sentence negation sequence replaced with direct assertions 'A kid had a fever. The fever required presence.'; line 175 'Not soothing. Not monitoring.' removed, arriving directly at 'Confirming.'; line 191 'not resolved, just recategorized' replaced with 'eclipsed'; line 213 negation-pivot replaced with positive assertion 'Eighteen years of knowing that face, and tonight the looking was easy'; line 217 'Not the proxy job...' negation list replaced with 'the real one, older than any proxy contract, older than any classification.' 30-line spacing: 17-to-63=46, 63-to-165=102, 165-to-217=52.
finding_results.notes: Reduced from 9+ flagged instances (plus 2 unflagged at lines 89 and 191) to exactly 4. All four retained instances define something the reader could not infer from the positive assertion alone. No 30-line stretch contains more than one instance. Replacements use direct assertion, sensory image, or character-grounded detail rather than negation-first rhetoric.

finding_results.evidence: Six specifying-construction instances retained: (1) chapters/chapter_15.md:47 'the way he used to lean' — character-specific sensory detail. (2) chapters/chapter_15.md:71 'the one with noodles' — concrete object identification. (3) chapters/chapter_15.md:87 'the one with the faded milliliter markings' — specific object. (4) chapters/chapter_15.md:133 'the one that lived in muscle memory' — thematically central. (5) chapters/chapter_15.md:201 'the blue one with the chip' — specific object knowledge. (6) chapters/chapter_15.md:217 'the way parents slept' — thematically essential. Removed instances: line 7 'the kind that made' replaced with 'enough to make'; line 35 'the kind of fever that ran its course in two days' replaced with direct rendering 'two days, maybe three, and all it needed was'; line 63 'the way it pressed him' replaced with 'how it pressed him'; line 99 'the way children returned to books, not from the beginning but from wherever they'd stopped' replaced with Theo-specific 'from wherever he'd stopped, mid-chapter'; line 115 'the way kids did — not gradually, not negotiating with wakefulness, but all at once' replaced with direct 'all at once'; line 165 'the way four-year-olds recovered from vomiting' replaced with 'from the vomiting'; line 175 'the kind of unconscious motion parents made' replaced with Mira-specific 'a motion she didn't know she was making'; line 201 'the way he knew' removed, list governed directly by 'He knew'; line 217 'The one that had no protocol' and 'the kind that ran on no sleep' both replaced with direct assertion; line 221 'the way Dan always said' replaced with 'exactly as Dan always said'. No single paragraph contains more than one instance.
finding_results.notes: Reduced from 13+ instances (original count missed several: lines 7, 63, 165, 221) to exactly 6. At least 6 removed instances replaced with direct sensory rendering or Theo-/Mira-specific detail rather than generic taxonomic classification. The revision converts inventory-catalog prose into grounded, particular description — especially at lines 99 (children generalized to Theo-specific), 115 (generic kid sleep to direct image), and 175 (parents generalized to Mira-specific).

summary: Both findings addressed. Negation-pivot constructions reduced from 11 to 4, with all retained instances earning their exclusions and spaced >30 lines apart. Specifying constructions ('the kind of,' 'the one that/with,' 'the way [S][V]') reduced from 15+ to 6, with no paragraph containing more than one. Replacements favor direct assertion, sensory rendering, and character-specific detail over taxonomic classification and negation-first rhetoric. No content was softened or sanitized; the chapter's emotional register is preserved or sharpened. Heading contract maintained. Dialogue contraction levels verified against style bible (Dan high, Mira moderate, Theo high). Continuity cross-checked against continuity sheet (Theo age 9, apartment third floor, creaking second-landing step, F train, east-facing window, refrigerator 40-minute cycle, brownstone cracked cornice). All edits are line-level prose polish; no structural, scene, or continuity changes.
